description.value:
Your understanding of your own emotions and soul deepens profoundly. You gain additional benefits depending on your current soulfeel attunement. Fury: You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to your Athletics checks. Joy: You gain a fly Speed of 20 feet. Sorrow: You gain a burrow Speed of 10 feet. Wonder: You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to your Perception checks.

Special If you have @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.Mascot Power!], the summoned minion gains the same benefits of Soulfire as you.
